nasb.text: But Nahash the Ammonite said to them, “I will make it with you on this condition, that I will gouge out the right eye of every one of you, thus I will make it a reproach on all Israel.”

esv.text: But Nahash the Ammonite said to them, “On this condition I will make a treaty with you, that I gouge out all your right eyes, and thus bring disgrace on all Israel.”

cnv.text: 亞捫人拿轄對他們說：“這是我與你們立約的條件：我要剜出你們各人的右眼，用來羞辱以色列眾人。”

ccb.text: 亚扪人拿辖说：“好，但有一个条件，我要挖去你们每一个人的右眼作为对全体以色列人的羞辱。”
